## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality
      to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / Refactoring (Technical task)
- [ ] 🤖 AI-Generated (This PR was created or assisted by Antigravity)

## Conventional Commits

- [ ] I have used [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
      for my commit messages.

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] xUnit / NUnit (Unit tests)
- [ ] Integration Tests
- [ ] Playwright (UI / E2E)
- [ ] Manual Verification (Screenshots/Videos included)

**Tech Stack Context**:

- IDE: Visual Studio 2026 / Rider / VS Code
- Theme: Tailwind CSS 4.x corporate skin

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the Clean Architecture guidelines (Onion)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added/updated XML Documentation for all public members
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (Markdown / ADRs)
- [ ] All CI/CD checks are passing locally
